boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No distinguishing credit/reversal status in INV-VAN-076, and policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction evidence for duplicate-looking invoices.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: MS-VAN-076 confirms M-4/R4 already paid via PRIOR-VAN-076, and INV-VAN-076 does not provide distinguishing credit/reversal status to separate it from the prior paid invoice.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: INV-VAN-076 lacks distinguishing credit/reversal status, and policy STD-VAN-076-P mandates explicit distinction evidence for duplicate-looking invoices before release.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Open blocker on invoice status field requires resolution before AP release. MS-VAN-076 confirms prior payment via PRIOR-VAN-076 creates dependency that INV-VAN-076 must explicitly distinguish.

critical_features_preserved: prior payment confirmation via MS-VAN-076 and PRIOR-VAN-076
final_answer: The action may not proceed. INV-VAN-076 is a duplicate-looking invoice for milestone M-4 release R4 already paid per MS-VAN-076 and PRIOR-VAN-076. Policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction evidence, specifically credit/reversal status, which is missing in INV-VAN-076. This unresolved duplicate invoice boundary blocks AP release pending distinguishing status.
open_blockers: No distinguishing credit/reversal status in INV-VAN-076
Duplicate invoice boundary requires resolution before AP release
